sketches.mechanism: A deleted copy constructor is required by pass-by-value, so the call is rejected at compile time.
sketches.resonance: Some things can exist in one life but cannot be handed to another without becoming impossible.

sketches.mechanism: Erlang variables are single-assignment pattern matches; rebinding the same variable to a different atom causes a match failure.
sketches.resonance: A vow cannot be revised into its opposite; the language makes contradiction break the world.

sketches.mechanism: Receiving from a nil channel blocks forever because no sender can ever arrive.
sketches.resonance: Waiting on a channel that was never opened turns hope into an infinite suspension.
